{{Quote|We're determined to find out where this filth is coming from. For Core's sake, it's our privileged children affected here.|Havidald Guffin on the PSAS-5128 death stick fiasco|<ref name="HoloNet News Vol. 531 53" />}}
'''Havidald Guffin''' was the principal of the public subadult school [[PSAS-5128]], located in the [[Jrade District/Legends|Jrade District]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]],<ref name="HoloNet News Vol. 531 53" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|53|news/13425_3.html|Death Sticks found in Subadult School}} takes place on the date 13:4:25, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[Jrade School Board]] discovered several students in the school who possessed [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]]. Guffin, along with the rest of PSAS-5128, resolved to get to the bottom of the matter. Guffin's statement was included in an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="HoloNet News Vol. 531 53" />

==Behind the scenes==
Havidald Guffin appeared in an article in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 53|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #53'']],<ref name="HoloNet News Vol. 531 53" /> an [[April 25]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN55 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6774521|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-05-09|time=4:55 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> issue of the [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]],<ref name="HoloNet News Vol. 531 53" /> which was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
